headline: Garmin Ltd. schedules second quarter 2026 earnings call
summary: Garmin Ltd. (NYSE: GRMN) invites shareholders and investors to listen to its second quarter 2026 earnings conference call on Wednesday, July 29, 2026, at 10:30 a.m. EDT, with executives of Garmin. The call will be held in conjunction with the company's earnings release, which will be distributed prior to market open on July 29, 2026.
